project_summary: Requirements draft from 7 utterances (Client, PM) with 4 functional requirements, 1 non-functional requirements, 1 constraints, and 3 open questions.

functional_requirements.text: Our school clubs need an app to publish weekly meeting schedules.
Club leaders should create and update events.
Students should join events and receive reminder notifications.
Only club leaders and the student council should cancel events.

non_functional_requirements.text: It should be easy to use for freshmen.

constraints.text: Only club leaders and the student council should cancel events.

assumptions.text: Maybe attendance analytics can be added later.

open_questions.text: Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: It should be easy to use for freshmen.
Who is allowed to cancel events?
How should this quality requirement be measured: It should be easy to use for freshmen.?

follow_up_questions: Can you clarify: Ambiguous quality target needs clarification: It should be easy to use for freshmen?
Who is allowed to cancel events?
